1: The words of king Lemuel, the prophecy that his mother taught him.
2: And what, the son of my vows?
3: Nor thy ways to that which destroyeth kings.
5: And pervert the judgment of any of the afflicted.
6: And wine unto those that be of heavy hearts.
7: And remember his misery no more.
8: In the cause of all such as are appointed to destruction.
9: And plead the cause of the poor and needy.
10: For her price is is far above rubies.
11: So that he shall have no need of spoil.
12: All the days of her life.
13: And worketh willingly with her hands.
14: She bringeth her food from afar.
15: And a portion to her maidens.
16: With the fruit of her hands she planteth a vineyard.
18: Her candle goeth not out by night.
19: And her hands hold the distaff.
20: Yea, she reacheth forth her hands to the needy.
21: For all her household are are clothed with scarlet.
22: Her clothing is is silk and purple.
23: When he sitteth among the elders of the land.
24: And delivereth girdles unto the merchant.
25: And she shall rejoice in time to come.
26: And in her tongue is is the law of kindness.
27: And eateth not the bread of idleness.
28: Her husband also also , and he praiseth her.
30: But But a woman that that feareth the LORD LORD , she shall be praised.
31: And let her own works praise her in the gates.
